title: Glow Sqast
description: Changes Ghasts and Happy Ghasts to look like Glow Squids!
body:
This is a Glow Squid version of my original Sqast resource pack.
You can get the original (normal Squid) version [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sqast)

This version of Sqast changes Ghasts and Happy Ghasts to look like Glow Squids :D
It also changes the textures of the Glow Sqast/Happy Glow Sqast Spawn Eggs, Glow Sqast Tears, "Tears" Music Disc, and the Dried Glow Sqast
![All of the new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ybySk852/images/e32af53921a7827c13aaef32921370d421ce487e.png)

Note: In order for it to actually "glow" (with an emissive texture) you will need a mod like [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (Entity Texture Features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home). However, I've only tested the pack with ETF, so although it should work with Optifine too, it's not guaranteed that it will.



**This pack will change the names of Ghasts and their related items if your language is set to one of the following:**
- English US,
- English UK,
- German (Deutsch) Thanks to [foenichs](https://modrinth.com/user/foenichs) for helping translate :)
- Pirate Speak,
- LOLCAT,
- Shakespearean English,
- English Upsidedown,
- English Australian,
- English Canadian,
- English New Zealand,
- or Anglish (Oned Riches)


Links:
